title: senna pallida
intro: Senna pallida is a plant species in the legume family, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which are responsible for its laxative effects. Traditionally, Senna pallida has been used to treat constipation, promote digestive health, and support the removal of toxins from the body. Herbal preparations of Senna pallida can be found in the form of tea, capsules, or tablets, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential side effects.
